title: Sample item — replace this with your demo's content
body: Hackathon teams: replace this file (and the customers.json sibling) with real or mocked data for your demo. The shape is flexible — sprint customisation will adapt src/lib/knowledge.ts to match whatever fields you need.

title: Second sample item
body: Three items is enough to exercise list-rendering, click-through navigation, and detail views. Hackathon teams typically swap in 5–10 items with their actual demo content. If your shape differs (more fields, fewer fields, nested structure), edit both items.json and src/lib/knowledge.ts to match.

title: Third sample item
body: The shape here (id / title / body / tags[]) is generic on purpose — maps cleanly to call summaries, meeting notes, project briefs, decision logs, or anything else hackathon teams typically want to render. Customise freely.
